title: Waymo says San Francisco service has resumed after one-hour pause
summary: Waymo says robotaxi service has resumed after it made “temporary adjustments” in San Francisco amidst a power outage that appears to have affected around 7,000 PG&E customers in the city.
caption: output/2026-07-18/waymo-says-san-francisco-service-has-resumed-after-one-hour-pause.txt
